display_name: 兔子镜小剧场 / Rabbit Mirror Theater（小小维修兔 v1.3 交互隔离修正版）
author: Toto
description: TEST build: fixes Maintenance Rabbit false-green results for radio/checkbox interactions by detecting duplicate control IDs and broken local label bindings, then mirror-scoping id/for/radio-name and CSS #id/[id=...] references before reinstalling existing safe interaction rescue. Each repair remains mirror-scoped. Retains 101 thematic elements, 177 presentation formats, Menu QR v2.1, full-chain diagnostics, thinking isolation, and all existing generation features.
